formulas.name: Law of Conservation of Energy
formulas.statement: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only converted from one form to another

formulas.name: First Law of Thermodynamics
formulas.statement: Energy is neither created nor destroyed, only converted from one form to another
formulas.notes: Describes the relationship between energy and work

formulas.name: Thermal Energy
formulas.notes: Describes the relationship between heat energy and temperature change

formulas.name: Potential Energy
formulas.notes: Describes the potential energy of an object

formulas.name: Kinetic Energy
formulas.notes: Describes the kinetic energy of an object
